name: Accenture
navigation_hints: Loads Accenture's global homepage, clicks the Careers nav button, then clicks 'Search for jobs' to land on the job search page. Fills the search bar (clicking the overlay div , then typing), presses Enter. Iterates job cards (div.rad-filters-vertical__job-card-header): clicks each to expand, finds 'Read full job description' link for the canonical detail URL. Handles 'Load more' pagination. Salary extracted from a per-location table on the detail page matching 'Annual Salary Range'.

name: ArentFox Schiff
navigation_hints: Starts on the ArentFox Schiff careers page, clicks 'Professionals', then expands 'Apply Now' to reveal city links pointing to viglobalcloud portals. Scans all hrefs for viglobalcloud.com and iterates each city portal. Searches the viDesktop grid for the role by matching all keywords on job row text. On the detail page, location is extracted from the prefix before ': $amount' on the salary line (e.g. 'DC, CH, BOS, LA, NY, SF: $150,000 to $200,000 per year.').

name: Alston & Bird
navigation_hints: Navigates to Alston's own job listing page at /en/careers/attorneys-and-patent-professionals/job-opportunities/, dismisses 'Reject Non-Necessary Cookies' banner, clicks 'LOAD MORE' until all results are loaded, then filters using the 'SEARCH BY NAME' input. Collects all job links under the job-opportunities path, visits each detail page, and extracts title from the HTML <title> tag (first segment before '|') and location from the content block after the LinkedIn share <ul>.

name: Alston & Bird (Workday)
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at alston.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/ExternalCareer. Searches by keyword , collects job card labels, filters by role, then clicks each card to update the right detail panel. Location is read from [locations] and 'additionalLocations' within the jobDetails panel; 'View All N Locations' is clicked to reveal all offices. Salary from compensation/salaryRange automation-id attributes or dollar-range regex on full text.

name: Bain & Company
navigation_hints: Starts on Bain's careers homepage, clicks 'FIND JOBS' (a.btn), opens the Locations filter (h5.feed-filter-block__title), checks US office checkboxes from a predefined set of cities (Atlanta, Boston, Chicago, etc.) inside the 'North & Latin America' column only. Optionally types a keyword. Collects job cards (div.card__wrapper) with title (h4), category, offices (div.card--role-results__region li), and parent <a> href. Handles 'Load more' pagination. Visits detail pages for salary.

name: Baker McKenzie
navigation_hints: Navigates directly to the Baker McKenzie careers portal at careers.bakermckenzie.com/en_US/opportunities, dismisses 'Necessary Cookies Only' banner, fills the Keywords field with the role, presses Enter. Collects links to JobDetail pages from the search results, keyword-filters by title, visits each detail page in a new tab to extract title (h1/h2), location (text after 'Location' label or city regex), and salary. Paginates via the 'Next' button.

name: Boston Consulting Group
navigation_hints: Starts on the BCG US locations page, clicks the Search button (button#ph-search-backdrop), expands the 'Country/Region' accordion, checks 'United States of America', then types the role into input#subSearchTextbox. Collects a.apply-btn elements: builds the canonical detail URL from data-ph-tevent-attr-trait5 (job code). Visits each detail page for title, location, salary (only $XX,XXX+ amounts). Handles 'Load more' pagination.

name: Cooley LLP
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at cooley.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/Cooley_US_LLP. Searches by keyword in the standard Workday search box, collects all job card titles (a[[jobTitle]]), filters by role keywords, then clicks each card to update the right detail panel. Reads location from [locations]/'additionalLocations' in the jobDetails panel, clicks 'View All N Locations' if present. Salary from compensation/salaryRange automation-id or dollar regex.

name: Davis Polk
navigation_hints: Navigates the Davis Polk careers overview page, then goes directly to the Workday portal at davispolk.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com/business-professionals-services-usa. Searches by keyword in the Workday search box, clicks each matching job card to update the right panel, extracts title from jobPostingTitle automation-id, location from the locations/additionalLocations containers, and salary from compensation/salaryRange attributes or dollar regex.

name: Dechert
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at dechert.wd12.myworkdayjobs.com/DechertCareers. Searches by keyword (dropping attorney/lawyer/counsel stop words), collects job card labels, filters by role, clicks each card to update the right detail panel. Location read from [locations] and 'additionalLocations' in the jobDetails panel. Salary from compensation or salaryRange automation-id or dollar regex.

name: Deloitte
navigation_hints: Starts on Deloitte's US homepage, clicks Careers in the primary nav, clicks 'Job search' sub-link to open apply.deloitte.com in a new tab, then clicks 'Search jobs' for experienced professionals. Types the role keyword in the search input. Iterates article.article--result job cards for title (h3 a.link), company (first subtitle span), and location (last subtitle span). Visits each detail page for salary. Handles next-page pagination via the results list.

name: DLA Piper
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at dlapiper.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/dlapiper. Searches by keyword , collects job card labels, filters by role, clicks each card to update the right detail panel. Location read from [locations]/'additionalLocations' in the jobDetails panel; work type (Hybrid/Full time) filtered out via the Salary from compensation/salaryRange attributes or inline dollar regex.

name: EY
navigation_hints: Starts on ey.com/en_us/careers, clicks 'Careers' top nav, then 'Job search', then 'Experienced' to reach careers.ey.com. On the portal, clicks 'More options' to reveal country filter, selects 'United States' from the country dropdown, fills the keyword search box, and submits. Collects job cards with pagination. Visits each detail page for title, location, and salary. Career portal is careers.ey.com.

name: Foley & Lardner
navigation_hints: Starts on Foley's careers page, navigates to the iCIMS portal at careers-foley.icims.com with a keyword in the searchKeyword param. All content lives inside an iframe named 'icims_content_iframe'. Collects job links from the iframe DOM, visits each detail page to extract title, location, and salary. Keyword search is done via URL param.

name: Gibson Dunn
navigation_hints: Uses a 4-step wizard on the Gibson Dunn careers site: navigates Office → Practice Area → Positions. The listing page renders all global jobs in static HTML regardless of filter selections; city abbreviations in job titles (NY, DC, SF, LA) are used for location matching. Collects job links, visits each detail page for salary and experience.

name: Goodwin Law
navigation_hints: Starts on Goodwin's careers page, collects job listing links under /careers/jobs/ from search result containers (excluding 'Featured Careers' at the bottom). Location is extracted from the HTML <title> tag (format: 'Job Title | City | Goodwin') or from the URL slug prefix (ny-, la-, bos-, sm-, dc-, sf-, etc.) mapped to city names. Salary links to PDF pay transparency files; no inline salary. No Workday automation-id attributes — pure HTML scraping.

name: Goldman Sachs
navigation_hints: Starts on Goldman Sachs careers page, navigates to higher.gs.com/results for the job search portal. Iterates job listing pages with keyword filtering. Visits each detail page on gs.com for salary and description extraction. Handles pagination via URL parameters.

name: Greenberg Traurig
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at gtlaw.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/GTLAW. Searches by keyword, collects job card titles, filters by role, clicks each card to update the right detail panel. Location read from [locations]/'additionalLocations'. Salary from compensation/salaryRange attributes or dollar regex.

name: Hogan Lovells
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at hoganlovells.wd3.myworkdayjobs.com/Search with a US location country pre-filter. Searches by keyword, clicks each matching job card to update the right detail panel, reads location from locations/additionalLocations automation-id containers, and salary from compensation/salaryRange attributes.

name: JPMorgan Chase
navigation_hints: Starts on JPMorgan Chase homepage, clicks 'Join our team' (opens Oracle portal in new tab at jpmc.fa.oraclecloud.com). Types role into input#keyword and 'United States' into input#location, selects first suggestions from dropdowns, clicks search. Collects a.job-grid-item__link cards; location decoded from the href location= param. Paginates via pagination-next. Visits each /jobs/preview/{id}/ detail page for salary and description.

name: Kobre & Kim
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at kobrekim.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/KobreKim_Attorney_External_Careers. Searches by keyword, clicks each matching card to update the right detail panel. Location and salary extracted from standard Workday.

name: KPMG
navigation_hints: Starts on the KPMG US careers site at kpmguscareers.com, navigates to the job search page at /job-search/, and applies keyword and location filters. Collects job cards and visits each detail page for salary and description.

name: King & Spalding
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at kslaw.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/careers. Searches by keyword , collects job card labels, clicks each card to update the right detail panel. Location from locations/additionalLocations automation-id, salary from compensation/salaryRange or dollar regex.

name: Latham & Watkins
navigation_hints: Navigates to the iCIMS portal at us-associatecareers-lw.icims.com for the keyword search. Content is inside an iframe (#icims_content_iframe). Searches by keyword, collects job links from the iframe, and visits each detail page to extract title, location, and salary.

name: McDermott Will & Emery
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at mwe.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com/mwe_careers. Searches by keyword , collects job card labels, clicks each card to update the right detail panel. Location from locations/additionalLocations automation-id, salary from compensation/salaryRange or dollar regex in page text.

name: McKinsey & Company
navigation_hints: Loads the McKinsey job search page filtered to United States (?countries=United+States). Clicks the Locations dropdown, expands North America accordion, and selects 'All' under North America. Types role keyword into the search input. Collects job cards (a[href*='/careers/search-jobs/jobs/']), iterates with 'Load more' pagination. Visits each detail page for salary and description.

name: Morgan Stanley
navigation_hints: Starts on Morgan Stanley careers page, clicks 'Jobs for Experienced Professionals', selects 'Americas', clicks GO (opens eightfold.ai portal in new tab). On morganstanley.eightfold.ai, clicks 'All Filters', expands Location accordion, checks 'United States of America', applies filter. Types role keyword, collects job cards (title from div.title-1aNJK, location from div.fieldValue-3kEar). Paginates via start=N URL param. Visits detail pages for salary.

name: Munger, Tolles & Olson
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at mto.wd503.myworkdayjobs.com/MTO_Careers. Searches by keyword , collects job card labels, clicks each card to update the right detail panel. Location from locations/additionalLocations automation-id containers, salary from compensation/salaryRange or dollar regex.

name: Perkins Coie
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at perkinscoie.wd115.myworkdayjobs.com/en-US/perkinscoieexternal. Searches by keyword , collects job card labels, clicks each card to update the right detail panel. Location from locations/additionalLocations automation-id, salary from compensation/salaryRange or dollar regex.

name: PwC
navigation_hints: Starts on PwC's global homepage, clicks Careers in the top nav, clicks 'Search for a job', selects 'United States', then clicks 'Search Strategy& jobs'. Lands on jobs.us.pwc.com and navigates to the /search-jobs/Strategy/932/1 filtered page. Collects li.search-results-list__item cards with pagination. Visits each detail page for salary and description.

name: Skadden
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at skadden.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com/Skadden_Careers. Searches by keyword , collects job card labels, clicks each card to update the right detail panel. Location from locations/additionalLocations automation-id, salary from compensation/salaryRange or dollar regex.

name: Simpson Thacher & Bartlett
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at stblaw.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/en-US/careers. Searches by keyword, collects job card labels, clicks each card to update the right detail panel. Location from locations/additionalLocations automation-id, salary from compensation/salaryRange or dollar regex.

name: Stoel Rives
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at stoel.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/stoelrivescareers. Searches by keyword , collects job card labels, clicks each card to update the right detail panel. Location from locations/additionalLocations automation-id, salary from compensation/salaryRange or dollar regex.

name: Wachtell Lipton
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at wd1.myworkdaysite.com/recruiting/vhr_wachtelllipton/wlrk. Searches by keyword, clicks each matching card to update the right panel. Location and salary extracted from standard Workday.

name: White & Case
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at wd1.myworkdaysite.com/recruiting/whitecase/External. Searches by keyword , collects job card labels, clicks each card to update the right detail panel. Location from locations/additionalLocations automation-id, salary from compensation/salaryRange or dollar regex.

name: Weil, Gotshal & Manges
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop portal at selfapply.weil.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx with a Tag-based URL. If the Tag expires, navigates to weil.com/careers and scans hrefs for selfapply.weil.com. Uses #contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList grid. Searches via #contentPlaceHolder_textKeyWord. Captures each row href (RecJobView preferred) before clicking; doPostBack navigation does not change page.url. Apply link is in td.rptAction a[id*='linkButtonApply'].

name: Reed Smith
navigation_hints: Loads the self-hosted viDesktop portal at recruiter.reedsmith.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx with a Tag-based URL. If expired, navigates to reedsmith.com/en/careers and scans hrefs for recruiter.reedsmith.com. Portal grid: #contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList. Searches via #contentPlaceHolder_textKeyWord. Capture row href before clicking.

name: Winston & Strawn
navigation_hints: Uses permanent FilterREID=3&FilterJobCategoryID=10 URL at winstonstrawncareers.viglobalcloud.com (never expires). Fallback: navigates to winston.com/en/careers/business-professionals, clicks 'Available Positions', scans hrefs for winstonstrawncareers.viglobalcloud.com. Uses #contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList grid. Salary may appear as 'minimum of $X ... maximum of $Y' prose — applies prose salary regex.

name: Paul Hastings
navigation_hints: Loads the self-hosted viDesktop portal at jobs.phextranet.com/PH-Attorney/viRecruitSelfApply/ReDefault.aspx (note: ReDefault not RecDefault) with a Tag-based URL. If expired, scans paulhastings.com/careers hrefs for jobs.phextranet.com. Grid: #contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList. Salary often as prose 'minimum of $X ... maximum of $Y'.

name: Blank Rome
navigation_hints: All job listings are inline anchor links on the Business Professionals page in format 'Job Title | City, ST'. Each href points to careers.blankrome.com/Applicant/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx?FilterREID=7&FilterJobCategoryID=X&FilterJobID=N. Scrapes all matching job links from the page first; for each job visits the FilterJobID URL (redirects to RecApplicantEmail.aspx) to extract salary and experience. Permanent board URL: FilterREID=7 (never expires).

name: Dorsey & Whitney
navigation_hints: Starts on dorsey.com/careers, dismisses OneTrust cookie banner (#onetrust-accept-btn-handler), navigates directly to /careers/staff (SPA routing blocks click navigation). Scans hrefs for recruiting.dorsey.com — 'View Current Openings' links to the viDesktop portal. Tag-based URL at recruiting.dorsey.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx — re-discover from /careers/staff if expired. Grid: #contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList.

name: Brown Rudnick
navigation_hints: Business Professionals careers page has job links hidden inside collapsed accordion sections. Expands ALL accordion toggles (button[aria-expanded], button.accordion__toggle, button:has-text('+')), scrolling each into view with 350ms delay between clicks. Then scans hrefs for brownrudnickcareers.viglobalcloud.com. Strips FilterJobID and FilterJobCategoryID to get the board URL. Permanent URL: FilterREID=3&FilterJobCategoryID=1 (never expires).

name: Armstrong Teasdale
navigation_hints: Multi-step navigation: (1) goto armstrongteasdale.com/careers/business-professionals/, (2) goto /careers/current-openings/?office=all&position=professional-staff, (3) scans hrefs for armstrongteasdale-careers.viglobalcloud.com. Permanent URL: FilterREID=3&FilterJobCategoryID=1 (never expires). Grid: #contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList.

name: Greenspoon Marder
navigation_hints: Navigates to greenspoon.com/careers and scans hrefs for greenspoonmarder-apply.viglobalcloud.com. Permanent URL: FilterREID=2&FilterJobCategoryID=2 (never expires). Grid: #contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList. Searches via #contentPlaceHolder_textKeyWord.

name: Robins Kaplan
navigation_hints: Navigates to robinskaplan.com/careers and scans hrefs for robinskaplan-apply.viglobalcloud.com. Tag-based URL — re-discover from careers page if expired. Grid: #contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList. Searches via #contentPlaceHolder_textKeyWord.

name: Wiley
navigation_hints: Navigates to wiley.law/careers then to /careers-professional-staff. Scans hrefs for WileyLawExt.viglobalcloud.com (case-sensitive). Permanent URL: FilterREID=14 (never expires). Grid: #contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList.

name: Honigman
navigation_hints: Starts on honigman.com/careers-careers (not /careers), dismisses cookie banner ('Accept All'), clicks 'Business Professionals' tile to navigate to /careers-business-professionals. Scans hrefs for careers.honigman.com/viRecruitSelfApply matching FilterJobCategoryID=3 (Business Professionals, not Paralegals=2). Permanent URL: FilterREID=5&FilterJobCategoryID=3.

name: Thompson Hine
navigation_hints: Starts on careers overview, clicks 'Professional Staff Careers' link to navigate to /careers/professional-staff/. Scans hrefs for apply.thompsonhine.com/videsktop/viRecruitSelfApply ('Open Staff Positions' button). Note non-standard path prefix: /videsktop/viRecruitSelfApply/. Permanent URL: FilterREID=3 (never expires).

name: Clark Hill
navigation_hints: Starts on clarkhill.com/careers, dismisses OneTrust cookie banner (#onetrust-accept-btn-handler), clicks 'Paralegals' heading to navigate to /paralegal-opportunities, then clicks 'Click here to view current openings'. Captures page.url if it matches clarkhillselfapply.viglobalcloud.com (use_current_url). Falls back to scanning hrefs. Tag-based URL — re-discover from careers if expired.

name: Kirkland & Ellis
navigation_hints: Staff careers page links to iCIMS portal at staffjobsus.kirkland.com. All content is inside an iframe. Keyword search is available inside the iframe. Collects job links from iframe DOM and visits each detail page.

name: Willkie Farr & Gallagher
navigation_hints: Starts on Willkie's Professional Staff careers page, navigates to iCIMS portal at jobs-willkie.icims.com with keyword in URL. All content inside #icims_content_iframe. Collects job links from iframe, visits each detail page for title, location, salary.

name: Milbank
navigation_hints: Starts on Milbank careers page, navigates to iCIMS portal at careers-milbank.icims.com with keyword in the searchKeyword URL param. Falls back to direct portal URL at careers-milbank.icims.com/jobs/search with hashed param. Content inside icims_content_iframe. Collects job links from iframe and visits each detail page.

name: Cleary Gottlieb
navigation_hints: Staff opportunities page links to iCIMS portal at careers-clearygottlieb.icims.com filtered by searchCategory=8718 (Administrative) and searchLocation params for NY or DC offices. Content inside #icims_content_iframe. Searches by keyword in iframe.

name: Orrick
navigation_hints: Navigates to Orrick's staff careers page, which links to the iCIMS Talent Cloud portal at talent.orrick.com/staff-us/jobs. This is a modern React SPA — NO iframe needed. Interacts with the page directly for keyword search, collects job cards, and visits each detail page for salary.

name: Loeb & Loeb
navigation_hints: Navigates to Loeb's careers page and follows the link to FLO Recruit portal at florecruit.com/v2/app/loeb/jobs. React SPA; scrolls through all job cards. All jobs on this board are staff roles. Collects title, location, salary from card content.

name: Holland & Hart
navigation_hints: Navigates to Holland & Hart's careers page and follows the staff jobs link to FLO Recruit at florecruit.com/v2/app/hollandhart/jobs. React SPA; scrolls through all job cards.

name: Dickinson Wright
navigation_hints: Navigates to Dickinson Wright's careers page and follows the link to FLO Recruit at florecruit.com/v2/app/dickinsonwright/jobs. React SPA; scrolls through all job cards for title, location, salary.

name: Winstead
navigation_hints: Navigates to Winstead's careers page and follows the link to FLO Recruit at florecruit.com/v2/app/winstead/jobs. React SPA; scrolls through all job cards.

name: Akin Gump Strauss Hauer & Feld
navigation_hints: Starts on the Business Services careers page, navigates to the SilkRoad ATS at jobs.silkroad.com/AkinGump/AkinGump. Static HTML, all jobs on one page. Job links are a[href*='/AkinGump/AkinGump/jobs/']; title from div.sr-panel__title, location from div.sr-panel__location. Keyword filtering done client-side. Detail page: title + location from HTML <title> tag ('Job Title - City, ST - Akin'); salary from description prose.

name: Barnes & Thornburg
navigation_hints: Uses the Ashby public API directly (no browser rendering). Calls api.ashbyhq.com/posting-api/job-board/barnes, filters by department='Business Professionals', and extracts title, location (primary city + state from secondaryLocations), and salary from descriptionPlain prose. Job URL is jobs.ashbyhq.com/barnes/{uuid}.

name: Covington & Burling
navigation_hints: Loads the Business Professionals employment opportunities page at cov.com with a Coveo search SPA. Job cards use class .search-results-card; location shown after 'Office:' label. Keyword search filters results. Some detail pages are PDFs — extracts text from PDFs when encountered.

name: Debevoise & Plimpton
navigation_hints: Starts on debevoise.com/careers, navigates to the CircaWorks portal at employer.circaworks.com/s/e-Debevoise-Plimpton-LLP-jobs-e87905.html. Server-rendered HTML, 15 jobs/page with ?s.p=N pagination. Keyword search via ?s.q= param. Job hrefs use javascript:self.popup('/j/...') — extracted via regex. Detail pages redirect to jobs.localjobnetwork.com; title in h1, location and salary in label/value table. Up to 20 pages.

name: Holland & Knight
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at hklaw.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/Holland_Knight with a pre-filtered staff facet URL param. Searches by keyword, collects job card titles, clicks each card to update the right panel. Location from locations/additionalLocations automation-id, salary from compensation/salaryRange or dollar regex.

name: Jones Day
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop portal at jonesdaystaffrecruitselfapply.viglobalcloud.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx with a Tag-based URL. If expired, navigates to jonesday.com/en/careers and scans hrefs for jonesdaystaffrecruitselfapply.viglobalcloud.com. Grid: #contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList. Role match mode: any_keyword.

name: K&L Gates
navigation_hints: Starts on klgates.com/careers, navigates to the custom Recsolu portal at klgates.recsolu.com/job_boards/1. Collects job listings from the portal, visits each detail page for title, location, and salary. Keyword filtering is done client-side.

name: Morrison Foerster
navigation_hints: Starts on mofo.com/careers, navigates to the custom career page at mofo.career.page/business-professionals/jobs. Attempts to intercept the JSON API for jobs; falls back to page scraping. Collects job cards for Business Professionals, visits each apply URL for salary and description.

name: Norton Rose Fulbright
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at nrf.wd3.myworkdayjobs.com/External. Searches by keyword , collects job card labels, clicks each card to update the right detail panel. Location from locations/additionalLocations automation-id, salary from compensation/salaryRange or dollar regex.

name: Paul, Weiss, Rifkind, Wharton & Garrison
navigation_hints: Loads the Oracle Taleo Enterprise listing page directly. Job rows are tr.ftlcopy.ftlrow; title from span.titlelink a; location from span[id*='reqBasicLocation'] in format 'United States-CA-Los Angeles' (cleaned to 'Los Angeles, CA'). Visits each detail page at /careersection/ex/jobdetail.ftl?job={REQNO} for salary from description prose. All US jobs rendered on one page; client-side keyword filtering.

name: Proskauer Rose
navigation_hints: Starts on proskauer.com/careers, navigates to Oracle HCM Cloud Candidate Experience at dfa.fa.us1.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_1001/jobs filtered to United States. Intercepts the Oracle REST API call to /hcmRestApi/resources/latest/recruitingCEJobRequisitions to get all job data without re-auth. Keyword filters on title. Visits each detail page (/job/{id}) for salary.

name: Squire Patton Boggs
navigation_hints: Starts on squirepattonboggs.com/join-us/, finds the CVMail portal link (fsr.cvmailuk.com/spb/), and paginates via &start=N (30 per page, up to 20 pages). Jobs are in plain HTML <tr> rows with title and location. Detail pages use main.cfm?page=jobSpecific&jobId=ID. Keyword filtering done client-side; no salary on listing or detail pages.

name: Sullivan & Cromwell
navigation_hints: Starts on sullcrom.com/careers, navigates to the Taleo portal at phg.tbe.taleo.net/phg04/ats/careers/v2/searchResults?org=SULLCROM&cws=38. Appends &keyword= for role search. Collects job cards with pagination. Visits each detail page for salary and description.

name: WilmerHale
navigation_hints: Starts on wilmerhale.com/en/careers, navigates to the SilkRoad portal at wilmerhale-openhire.silkroad.com/epostings/index.cfm?version=2&company_id=16437. Collects job listings from the static HTML, visits each detail page for title, location, and salary.

name: Arnold & Porter
navigation_hints: Navigates to arnoldporter.com/en/careers, accepts Usercentrics cookie banner in Shadow DOM, clicks 'Professional Staff' section header, then clicks the 'current-opportunities' link. On the listing page, clicks 'View All Current Opportunities' if present, then collects div.article-text-wrapper cards with title, location, and department. Visits each detail page for salary and experience.

name: Baker Botts
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop portal at bakerbottsselfapply.viglobalcloud.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx with a Tag-based URL. Fallback: navigates to bakerbotts.com/careers and scans hrefs for bakerbottsselfapply.viglobalcloud.com. Grid: #contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList. Searches via #contentPlaceHolder_textKeyWord. Default locations: Austin, Boston, Century City, Chicago, Dallas, Denver, Houston, London, Los Angeles, Miami, New York, Palo Alto, San Francisco, Silicon Valley, Washington D.C.

name: Baker & Hostetler
navigation_hints: Starts on bakerlaw.com/careers/professional-staff, follows the UltiPro link (a[href*='recruiting.ultipro.com']) to the portal at recruiting.ultipro.com/BAK1005BKH/JobBoard/. Waits for KnockoutJS to load job cards, then searches by keyword. Visits each OpportunityDetail page for salary from JSON-LD.

name: Ballard Spahr
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at ballardspahr.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com/Ballard_Spahr_LLP. Uses the shared WorkdayConfig service to search by keyword, click job cards, and extract title, location, and salary from standard.

name: Bryan Cave Leighton Paisner
navigation_hints: Loads bclplaw.com careers page with a job type filter param, clicks the first viglobalcloud link (a[href*='viglobalcloud']). Collects all viglobalcloud job links from the page, visits each viDesktop detail page for title, location, and salary.

name: Cadwalader, Wickersham & Taft
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop portal at recruiting.cwt.com/videsktop/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx?FilterREID=8. Standard viDesktop grid (#contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList). Job rows in the grid link to per-job detail pages. Keyword search via the search box.

name: Cozen O'Connor
navigation_hints: Starts on cozen.com/careers, clicks 'Business Professionals', then 'View Open Positions' to reach the Oracle HCM Cloud portal at hctq.fa.us2.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_1/jobs. Intercepts Oracle REST API for job data. Keyword-filters on title. Visits each /job/{id} detail page for salary and experience.

name: Faegre Drinker Biddle & Reath
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop portal at apply.faegredrinker.com/virecruitselfapply/RecDefault.aspx. Uses the shared videsktop_crawler VidesktopCrawler to search the grid and extract jobs. Tag-based URL with fallback discovery from the careers page.

name: Fenwick & West
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at fenwick.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/Fenwick_External_Careers. Uses shared WorkdayConfig service to search by keyword, click job cards, extract title, location, and salary from standard Workday.

name: Fish & Richardson
navigation_hints: Loads the self-hosted viDesktop portal at legalcareers.fr.com/videsktopEX/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx with a Tag-based URL. Uses the shared videsktop_crawler to search the grid and extract jobs.

name: Fish & Richardson (Business Professionals)
navigation_hints: Loads the UltiPro board directly at recruiting.ultipro.com/FIS1004/JobBoard/. Uses shared UltiproConfig service to search by keyword and collect job details from each OpportunityDetail page.

name: Fragomen
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at fragomen.wd115.myworkdayjobs.com/FragomenCareers with keyword appended as ?q= param. Collects job cards with location and salary extraction from the right detail panel using standard Workday.

name: Fried Frank
navigation_hints: Starts on friedfrank.com/careers, clicks 'Business services professionals', then 'career opportunities' (opens new tab to /careers/businessprofessionaljobopportunities). Reads the Greenhouse iframe src to extract the ?for= identifier, then navigates directly to boards.greenhouse.io/{for_id}. Collects and visits each Greenhouse job listing detail page.

name: Frost Brown Todd
navigation_hints: Starts on fbtgibbons.com/careers/, navigates to the Business Professionals sub-page, clicks 'Open Positions' which redirects to the ADP WorkforceNow portal. Waits for div.current-openings-list, clicks 'View all' to expand all jobs. Parses each div.current-openings-item for job ID, title, and location. For each matched job clicks the chevron arrow to open the detail panel, captures page.url, and extracts salary/experience from the updated page.

name: Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani
navigation_hints: Navigates to the iCIMS portal at careers-grsm.icims.com with searchCategory params for multiple departments (8737 and 38178). Uses iframe (in_iframe=1 param). Collects job links from the iframe, visits each detail page for title, location, and salary.

name: Haynes and Boone
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at haynesboone.wd503.myworkdayjobs.com/HaynesandBoone. Uses shared WorkdayConfig service to search by keyword, click job cards, and extract title, location, and salary from standard Workday.

name: Hunton Andrews Kurth
navigation_hints: Starts on hunton.com/en/careers/us-professional-staff.html, finds the 'View All' link to recruiting.ultipro.com/HUN1002HW/JobBoard/. Falls back to the UltiPro board URL directly. Uses UltiproConfig service to search by keyword and collect job details. Salary from JSON-LD on each OpportunityDetail page.

name: Husch Blackwell
navigation_hints: Loads the UltiPro board directly at recruiting2.ultipro.com/HUS1001HUSCH/JobBoard/. Uses shared UltiproConfig service to search by keyword and extract job details from each OpportunityDetail page.

name: Jackson Lewis
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at jacksonlewis.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/JacksonLewisLawyerCareers. Uses shared WorkdayConfig service to search by keyword, click job cards, and extract title, location, and salary from standard Workday.

name: Jenner & Block
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop portal at jennercareers.viglobalcloud.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx. Uses shared videsktop_crawler VidesktopCrawler to search the grid (#contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList) and extract job details.

name: Katten Muchin Rosenman
navigation_hints: Loads the FLO Recruit portal directly at florecruit.com/v2/app/katten/jobs?org=katten. Scrolls through all job cards in the React SPA, collects job listings for title, location, and salary. Keyword filtering done client-side.

name: Kilpatrick Townsend & Stockton
navigation_hints: Navigates to Kilpatrick's careers page, follows the UltiPro link to recruiting.ultipro.com/KIL1000/JobBoard/. Uses shared UltiproConfig service to search by keyword and extract job details from each OpportunityDetail page.

name: Littler Mendelson
navigation_hints: Loads the self-hosted viDesktop portal at videsktop.littler.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx. Uses shared videsktop_crawler VidesktopCrawler to search the grid and extract job details.

name: McDermott Will & Emery (rank_batch_2)
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at mwe.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com/mwe_careers. Uses shared WorkdayConfig service to search by keyword (staff category: 'Business Professionals'), click job cards, and extract title, location, and salary.

name: McGuireWoods
navigation_hints: Loads the iCIMS portal at staffcareers-mcguirewoods.icims.com/jobs/search with keyword in the searchKeyword param. All content inside icims_content_iframe. Collects job links from the iframe, visits each detail page for title, location, and salary.

name: Mintz, Levin, Cohn, Ferris, Glovsky and Popeo
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop portal at careers.mintz.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx. Uses shared videsktop_crawler VidesktopCrawler to search the grid and extract job details from each detail page.

name: Morgan, Lewis & Bockius
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at morganlewis.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com/morganlewis. Uses shared WorkdayConfig service to search by keyword, click job cards, and extract title, location, and salary from standard Workday.

name: Nelson Mullins Riley & Scarborough
navigation_hints: Loads the iCIMS portal at careers-nelsonmullins.icims.com/jobs/search. Waits for iframe[name='icims_content_iframe'] to appear, then searches in the iframe by keyword. Collects job links from the iframe and visits each detail page for title, location, and salary.

name: O'Melveny & Myers
navigation_hints: Starts on omm.com/about/careers/, navigates to the viDesktop portal at ommcareers.viglobalcloud.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx with a Tag-based URL. If expired, scans careers page hrefs for ommcareers.viglobalcloud.com. Grid: #contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList. Searches via #contentPlaceHolder_textKeyWord. Location from section.sub-title h5/h6 in each grid row.

name: Pillsbury Winthrop Shaw Pittman
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at pillsburylaw.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com/External. Uses shared WorkdayConfig service to search by keyword, click job cards, and extract title, location, and salary from standard Workday.

name: Polsinelli
navigation_hints: Starts on polsinelli.com/careers/apply, follows to the self-hosted viDesktop portal at virecruitex.polsinelli.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx. Tag-based URL — re-discover from careers page if expired. Grid: #contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList. Searches via #contentPlaceHolder_textKeyWord.

name: Seyfarth Shaw
navigation_hints: Loads the Seyfarth careers API at careers.seyfarth.com/api/jobs with keyword param appended to the base URL. Returns JSON job data. Keyword filtering on title. Visits each job detail page on careers.seyfarth.com for salary and description.

name: Steptoe
navigation_hints: Multi-step navigation: (1) steptoe.com/en/careers/index.html, (2) /staff/overview-professional-staff.html, (3) clicks 'Professional Staff: Current Opportunities' to reach the listing page. Parses div.career-listing elements with data-position (title), data-office (location), and a[href*=viglobalcloud] per-job viDesktop URL. Visits each steptoeapply.viglobalcloud.com detail page (FilterJobID=NNN) for salary.

name: Troutman Pepper
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at troutman.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com/TPRecruit1. Searches by keyword , collects job card labels, clicks each card to update the right detail panel. Location from locations/additionalLocations automation-id, salary from compensation/salaryRange or dollar regex.

name: Venable
navigation_hints: Loads the ADP job portal directly at myjobs.adp.com/venablebluecareers/cx/job-listing. Waits for the job listing SPA to load, applies keyword filter, and collects job cards. Visits each detail page for title, location, and salary.

name: Vinson & Elkins
navigation_hints: Loads the self-hosted viDesktop portal at portal.velaw.com/viDesktopEx/viRecruitSelfApply/ReDefault.aspx (note: ReDefault not RecDefault). Standard viDesktop grid; collects job row links and visits each detail page. Location and salary extracted from detail page text.

name: Williams & Connolly
navigation_hints: Loads the SmartSearch Online listing page directly — all jobs in one HTML table. Job links are td a href='jobdetails.asp?...&job_number=NNN' (relative, resolved to search3.smartsearchonline.com/wc/jobs/). All positions are Washington DC (location field is commented out in HTML). Keyword filtering done client-side. Visits each detail page for salary.

name: Baker Donelson
navigation_hints: Starts on bakerdonelson.com/careers, navigates through the careers site to find job listings. Collects job links and visits each detail page for title, location, and salary. Uses Playwright for dynamic content.

name: Buchanan Ingersoll & Rooney
navigation_hints: Starts on bipc.com/careers, navigates to Business Professionals section and finds the UltiPro link to recruiting.ultipro.com/BUC1009BUINR/JobBoard/. Falls back to UltiPro board URL directly. Searches by keyword, visits each OpportunityDetail page for salary.

name: Bradley Arant Boult Cummings
navigation_hints: Loads the Dayforce HCM portal at jobs.dayforcehcm.com/en-US/bradley/CANDIDATEPORTAL. Also supports keyword search via /bradley/CANDIDATEPORTAL?searchText= param. Waits for job card divs to render, collects listings, and visits each detail page at /en-US/bradley/CANDIDATEPORTAL/jobs/{id} for salary and description.

name: Buchalter
navigation_hints: Loads Buchalter's careers listing pages at www.buchalter.com/careers/page/{N}/. Scrolls through paginated HTML job cards, collects each job's title, location, and detail link. Visits each detail page for salary and experience.

name: Cahill Gordon & Reindel
navigation_hints: Loads Cahill's current openings page directly. All jobs are listed as static HTML on the firm's own domain under cahill.com. Collects job links from the listings, visits each detail page for title, location, and salary.

name: Cole Scott & Kissane
navigation_hints: Loads the UltiPro board directly at recruiting.ultipro.com/COL1035CSKK/JobBoard/ with keyword search via ?q=&o=relevance. Collects job links from the listing, visits each OpportunityDetail page for salary.

name: Davis Wright Tremaine
navigation_hints: Starts on dwt.com/careers with the professional-staff tab, navigates to the Jobvite portal at jobs.jobvite.com/dwt/. Collects job listings (with pagination if any), visits each detail page at jobs.jobvite.com/dwt/job/{id} for title, location, and salary.

name: Dinsmore & Shohl
navigation_hints: Loads Dinsmore's business professionals careers listing page. Scrolls through all job cards on the firm's own site, collects title, location, and detail links. Visits each detail page for salary. Handles pagination.

name: FBT Gibbons
navigation_hints: Starts on fbtgibbons.com/careers/business-professionals/, follows the 'Open Positions' link to the ADP WorkforceNow portal. Intercepts the /v1/job-requisitions API or scrapes the rendered page for job listings. Collects title, location, and job ID. Visits each portal detail page for salary.

name: Finnegan
navigation_hints: Loads Finnegan's all-openings careers listing page. Collects job cards with title and location from the static HTML. Visits each detail page on the firm's own domain for salary and description.

name: Fisher & Phillips
navigation_hints: Loads the Fisher & Phillips professional staff listing page, which embeds a ClearCompany widget. Searches via the ClearCompany keyword search box inside the widget (if available). Job detail URL is constructed as the listing URL + ?jobId={id}. Title from div.cc-job-description-title, location and salary from the description text.

name: Foley Hoag
navigation_hints: Loads the Greenhouse job board directly at job-boards.greenhouse.io/foleyhoag. Collects all job listings from the board, keyword-filters by title, and visits each detail page for title, location, and salary.

name: Gunderson Dettmer
navigation_hints: Starts on gunder.com/en/careers, follows the link to the Workday portal at gunder.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com/Gunderson. Searches by keyword , clicks each card to update the right detail panel. Location and salary from standard Workday.

name: HSF Kramer
navigation_hints: Loads the HSF Kramer careers portal at careers.hsfkramer.com/global/en, then navigates to the search results page. Applies keyword and country (United States) filters. Collects job cards and visits each detail page for salary and description.

name: Hughes Hubbard & Reed
navigation_hints: Loads the Greenhouse board at job-boards.greenhouse.io/hugheshubbardreedllp with keyword appended. Collects job links from the board, keyword-filters on title, visits each Greenhouse detail page for title, location, and salary.

name: Ice Miller
navigation_hints: Loads the Greenhouse job board at boards.greenhouse.io/icemiller. Collects all job listing links from the board, keyword-filters by title, and visits each detail page for title, location, and salary.

name: Jackson Walker
navigation_hints: Starts on jw.com/careers/business-professionals-paralegals/, finds the HRMDirect link and navigates to jw.hrmdirect.com/employment/job-openings.php. Collects job listings from the HRMDirect portal, keyword-filters, and visits each detail page at jw.hrmdirect.com/employment/view.php?req=XXXXXX for salary.

name: Knobbe Martens
navigation_hints: Loads Knobbe Martens' careers page. Collects job listings from the static or dynamically loaded page. Location extracted from 'Office(s)' section header followed by a UL of office cities. Visits each detail page for salary.

name: Lowenstein Sandler
navigation_hints: Navigates to the Jobvite portal at jobs.jobvite.com/lowensteinsandler/jobs/all. Collects all job links matching the pattern /lowensteinsandler/job/{alphanumeric}. Keyword-filters on job titles. Visits each Jobvite detail page for title, location, and salary.

name: Manatt, Phelps & Phillips
navigation_hints: Loads manatt.com/careers listing, collects job detail links under /careers/current-opportunities/{slug}. Jobs live entirely on the firm's own domain — no third-party ATS. Keyword filtering done client-side. Visits each detail page for title, location, and salary.

name: Marshall Dennehey
navigation_hints: Loads the Breezy HR job board at marshall-dennehey.breezy.hr/. Collects job listings from the board, keyword-filters by title, and visits each detail page for title, location, and salary.

name: Maynard Nexsen
navigation_hints: Loads Maynard Nexsen's careers page directly. Collects job card title and location — location extracted from the title string after the '|' separator, stripping junk UI text like 'Share Icon', 'PDF', 'Briefcase Icon'. Visits each detail page for salary.

name: McCarter & English
navigation_hints: Loads McCarter's jobs listing at mccarter.com/jobs/ directly. Collects job links and visits each detail page for title, location (extracted using US state abbreviation patterns), and salary.

name: Nixon Peabody
navigation_hints: Starts on nixonpeabody.com/careers, navigates to the Micronapps ASP.NET portal at nixonpeabody.careers.micronapps.com. Intercepts network requests to capture job detail URLs. Keyword-filters, clicks each job button to reveal salary in the expanded detail. Uses a fallback URL if the careers page navigation fails.

name: Paul Hastings (Workday)
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday staff-only board directly at paulhastings.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/PH-Staff. Uses shared WorkdayConfig service to search by keyword, click job cards, and extract title, location, and salary from standard.

name: Reed Smith (Workday)
navigation_hints: Starts on reedsmith.com/join-us/, attempts to discover the job board URL from the careers page. Falls back to careers.reedsmith.com/jobs/vacancy/find/results/. Paginates through job listings, applies keyword filter, and visits each detail page for title, location, and salary.

name: Saul Ewing
navigation_hints: Loads Saul Ewing's paralegals/business-professionals listing at saul.com. Jobs may be in an iframe or injected via Drupal Views AJAX. Uses multiple strategies: intercepts HTML/JSON responses, iterates page.frames, scrolls/parses DOM. Detail pages are at saul.com/careers/{slug}. Stealth JS injected to mask navigator.webdriver.

name: Shook, Hardy & Bacon
navigation_hints: Starts on shb.com/careers/staff, follows to the ADP Workforce Now portal (myjobs.adp.com/shook-careers/cx). Waits for the Angular SPA to hydrate, collects job cards pre-filtered to Professional Staff. Visits each detail page for salary.

name: Snell & Wilmer
navigation_hints: Navigates from swlaw.com/careers/business-professionals to the UltiPro board at recruiting2.ultipro.com/SNE1001SWLLP/JobBoard/. Falls back to the board URL directly. Uses shared UltiproService to search by keyword and visit each OpportunityDetail page for salary.

name: Stinson LLP
navigation_hints: Navigates from stinson.com/careers-current-opportunities to find the UltiPro link at recruiting2.ultipro.com/STI1009STIS/JobBoard/. Falls back to the board URL directly. Uses shared UltiproService to search by keyword and visit each OpportunityDetail page for salary.

name: Weil, Gotshal & Manges (Workday)
navigation_hints: Loads the Workday portal directly at weil.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/work_at_weil. Uses shared WorkdayConfig service to search by keyword, click job cards, extract title, location, and salary from standard Workday.

name: AALRR
navigation_hints: Loads the ADP WorkforceNow portal at workforcenow.adp.com with CID bdd4354b-. Intercepts the /v1/job-requisitions API to extract title, job ID, and location without re-auth. Keyword-filters on title. For each match, navigates to the portal page with &jobId=X and waits for 'Salary' text to appear before scraping.

name: Adams and Reese
navigation_hints: Loads the Adams and Reese professional staff listing page at adamsandreese.com/careers/professional-staff. Job application links point to a Smartsheet form. Collects job cards from the static HTML listing, keyword-filters on title, and uses the listing page data for title, location.

name: Allen Matkins
navigation_hints: Starts on allenmatkins.com/careers/index.html, navigates to /careers/current-staff-openings.html, finds the UltiPro link at recruiting.ultipro.com/ALL1028ALLN/JobBoard/. Uses UltiproService to search by keyword and visit each OpportunityDetail page for salary.

name: Benesch
navigation_hints: Navigates from beneschlaw.com/professional-staff/ to the ApplicantPro board at beneschlaw.applicantpro.com/jobsearch/?job_board_classification=Professional_Staff. Vue 3 SPA with all jobs on one page. Each div.bdb1 card contains title (div.w-card__title a), content with 'City, ST, USA | Full Time | $min - $max per year'. Salary and location already in listing; no detail visits needed.

name: Boies Schiller Flexner
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop portal at bsfcareers.viglobalcloud.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx with a Tag-based URL. If expired, navigates bsfllp.com/careers/ and scans hrefs for bsfcareers.viglobalcloud.com. Standard viDesktop grid; job rows link to inline detail panels on the same page. Salary may be hourly or annual.

name: Bond Schoeneck & King
navigation_hints: Loads bsk.com/careers/current-opportunities, finds links to florecruit.com/v2/app/bond/jobs/{encoded_id}/apply. Visits each FLO Recruit apply URL for title, location, and salary using the shared florecruit scrape_job_detail function.

name: Bracewell
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop portal at bracewellselfapply.viglobalcloud.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx with a Tag-based URL. If expired, navigates to bracewell.com/careers/business-professionals/ and scans hrefs for bracewellselfapply.viglobalcloud.com. Standard viDesktop grid; clicking a row opens an inline detail panel (no separate URL). Salary may be hourly or annual.

name: Brownstein Hyatt Farber Schreck
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop portal at apply.bhfs.com/viRecruitSelfApply/ReDefault.aspx?FilterREID=3. Permanent FilterREID URL for Professional Staff (never expires). Grid: #contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList. Search box: #contentPlaceHolder_textKeyWord. Search button: #contentPlaceHolder_buttonSearch.

name: Burr & Forman
navigation_hints: Loads the UltiPro board directly at recruiting2.ultipro.com/BUR1018BURF/JobBoard/. Searches by keyword, extracts location from the UltiPro location display fields. Visits each OpportunityDetail page for salary.

name: Carlton Fields
navigation_hints: Loads the Dayforce HCM portal at jobs.dayforcehcm.com/carltonfields/CANDIDATEPORTAL. Waits for job card divs to render, collects all listings, keyword-filters on title, and visits each detail page at /en-US/carltonfields/CANDIDATEPORTAL/jobs/{id} for salary and description.

name: Chapman and Cutler
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop Re-variant portal at chapmanselfapply.viglobalcloud.com/viRecruitSelfApply/ReDefault.aspx with a Tag-based URL. Note: uses ReDefault.aspx and ReJobView.aspx (not RecDefault/RecJobView). Listing uses DIV-based cards (#contentPlaceHolder_panelPositionsList div.row). Visits each ReJobView.aspx?Tag=...&JobID=N for salary in 'between $X and $Y' format.

name: Choate Hall & Stewart
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop portal at talent.choate.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx with a Tag-based URL. If expired, navigates choate.com/careers and scans hrefs for talent.choate.com. Standard viDesktop grid; clicking a row opens an inline detail panel. Salary may be hourly or annual.

name: Cole Schotz
navigation_hints: Loads Cole Schotz's career opportunities listing directly on the firm's own domain at coleschotz.com/careers/career-opportunities/. Jobs are static HTML with no external ATS portal. Collects job cards, keyword-filters, and visits each detail page for salary.

name: Cox Castle
navigation_hints: Starts on coxcastle.com/careers-administrative-staff, parses main#mainContent for viglobalcloud.com hrefs. Each href is RecDefault.aspx?FilterREID=4&FilterJobCategoryID=1&FilterJobID=N. Permanent URL: FilterREID=4&FilterJobCategoryID=1 (never expires). Standard viDesktop grid for job details.

name: Day Pitney
navigation_hints: Loads Day Pitney's professional staff careers listing on the firm's own site. No ATS — hiring is email-based. Collects job cards from the static HTML listing, keyword-filters on title, and extracts location from the card text.

name: Dykema Gossett
navigation_hints: Starts on dykema.com/careers/business-professionals.html, follows the UltiPro link to recruiting.ultipro.com/DYK1000DYGOS/JobBoard/. Falls back to the board URL directly. Uses UltiproService to search by keyword and visit each OpportunityDetail page for salary.

name: Fennemore Law
navigation_hints: Loads the ADP WorkforceNow portal at workforcenow.adp.com with the Fennemore CID. Intercepts the /v1/job-requisitions API to extract title, job ID, and location. For each keyword match, navigates to the portal with &jobId=X and waits for 'Salary' text to appear before scraping.

name: Goldberg Segalla
navigation_hints: Dynamically discovers listing URLs under the careers root path. Falls back to the New York listing page. Each job card iframe links to theapplicantmanager.com with a pos= param. Visits each detail page at theapplicantmanager.com/jobs?pos={id} for title (h1 with parenthetical city), location, and salary.

name: Goulston & Storrs
navigation_hints: Loads Goulston & Storrs' business professional careers page. Uses Playwright to render the page (some content may be LinkedIn-injected with zero-width Unicode chars). Collects job cards, keyword-filters, and visits each detail page for salary.

name: GrayRobinson
navigation_hints: Starts on gray-robinson.com/careers, finds UltiPro 'Click here to apply' links pointing to recruiting.ultipro.com/GRA1010GRAY/JobBoard/. Collects job listings from the firm's own careers page, keyword-filters, then visits each UltiPro OpportunityDetail URL for salary.

name: Herrick, Feinstein
navigation_hints: Loads Herrick's current openings page. Jobs are listed on the firm's own domain; detail pages use Paycom (paycomonline.net) for applications. Collects job cards, keyword-filters on title, and visits each detail page for title, location, and salary.

name: Hinshaw & Culbertson
navigation_hints: Starts on hinshawlaw.com/careers, navigates to the ApplicantStack portal at hinshawlaw.applicantstack.com/x/openings. Sorts by newest (?sort=1&sortdir=d), collects job listings. Keyword-filters on title. Visits each detail page for title, location, and salary.

name: Kasowitz
navigation_hints: Loads Kasowitz's job opportunities page at kasowitz.com/join-us/job-opportunities/ directly. Jobs are listed as static HTML on the firm's own domain. Collects job cards, keyword-filters, and visits each detail page for salary.

name: Kelley Drye
navigation_hints: Loads Kelley Drye's careers listing. The ATS is WP Job Openings (WordPress plugin) — jobs live on the firm's own domain as server-rendered HTML. Keyword search appended to URL as ?query=. Collects job cards, visits each detail page for salary.

name: Kutak Rock
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop portal at kutakrock-careers.viglobalcloud.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx with a Tag-based URL. Standard viDesktop grid for job listings. Falls back to discovery from the firm's careers page if Tag expires.

name: Lathrop GPM
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop portal at recruiting.lathropgpm.com/viDesktopEx/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx. Non-standard path prefix '/viDesktopEx/viRecruitSelfApply/' — uses full path prefix when resolving relative hrefs. Tag-based URL — re-discover from careers/openings page if expired.

name: Michael Best
navigation_hints: Loads Michael Best's professionals careers listing on the firm's own site. Keyword search appended as ?query= param. Collects job cards, visits each detail page for salary. ATS is WP Job Openings (AWSM Jobs WordPress plugin).

name: Miles & Stockbridge
navigation_hints: Loads the UltiPro board directly at recruiting.ultipro.com/MIL1025MSPC/JobBoard/. Uses shared UltiproConfig/UltiproService to search by keyword and visit each OpportunityDetail page for salary.

name: Munger, Tolles & Olson (rank_batch_4)
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop portal at joinmto.viglobalcloud.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx with FilterREID=4&FilterJobCategoryID=2 (permanent, never expires). Falls back to discovery from the mto.com careers page if needed. Standard viDesktop grid for job listings.

name: Moore & Van Allen
navigation_hints: Loads the UltiPro board at recruiting.ultipro.com/MOO1002MVA/JobBoard/ directly. Falls back to navigating from mvalaw.com/careers and finding the UltiPro link. Searches by keyword, visits each OpportunityDetail page for salary.

name: Offit Kurman
navigation_hints: Loads the Offit Kurman careers listing page, which contains 'Click here to apply' UltiPro links (a[href*='ultipro']). Collects title and UltiPro URL from each list item. Visits each recruiting.ultipro.com/OFF1001OFKU/JobBoard/ OpportunityDetail URL for salary.

name: Phelps Dunbar
navigation_hints: Navigates to the EnterTime Online portal at secure4.entertimeonline.com/ta/6022594.careers. Collects job listings from the custom ATS portal, keyword-filters on title, and visits each detail page for salary.

name: Porter Wright
navigation_hints: Loads Porter Wright's administration careers page, finds FLO Recruit apply links (florecruit.com). Visits each FLO Recruit apply URL for job title, location, and salary using the shared florecruit scrape_job_detail helper.

name: Procopio
navigation_hints: Loads Procopio's paralegals/staff careers listing. Each job card has an 'APPLY!' button linking to ADP WorkforceNow (workforcenow.adp.com). Extracts title, location (California cities), and the ADP apply URL from each card. Visits the ADP URL for salary.

name: Pryor Cashman
navigation_hints: Loads Pryor Cashman's current openings page at pryorcashman.com/careers/current-openings. Jobs are static HTML on the firm's own site with no external ATS. Collects job cards, keyword-filters, and visits each detail page for salary.

name: Quarles & Brady
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop portal at applyonline.quarles.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx with a Tag-based URL. Standard viDesktop grid; clicking a row opens an inline detail panel. Salary may be hourly or annual. Falls back to firm careers page if Tag expires.

name: Robins Kaplan (rank_batch_4)
navigation_hints: Starts on robinskaplan.com/careers/join-us, finds the UltiPro board link and navigates to recruiting.ultipro.com/ROB1006RKMCL/JobBoard/. Uses UltiproService to search by keyword and visit each OpportunityDetail page for salary.

name: Rutan & Tucker
navigation_hints: Loads Rutan & Tucker's staff page at rutan.com/contact-us/staff/. Job details are embedded in the page itself — no external ATS. Collects job listings, keyword-filters, and extracts location (California cities) and salary from the job text.

name: Seward & Kissel
navigation_hints: Loads Seward & Kissel's professional/administrative staff opportunities page at sewkis.com. Job listings are on the firm's own domain via WP Job Openings (WordPress plugin, no external ATS). Collects job cards, keyword-filters, and visits each detail page for salary.

name: Shumaker
navigation_hints: Starts on shumaker.com/company-overview/careers/, navigates to the job board URL found on the page. Collects job listings, keyword-filters on title, and visits each detail page. Apply links may point to workforcenow.adp.com.

name: Shutts & Bowen
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop Re-variant portal at recruit.shutts.com/viRecruitSelfApply/ReDefault.aspx?FilterREID=3 (permanent, never expires). Standard viDesktop grid for job listings. Falls back to discovery from shutts.com/about-career-opportunities if needed.

name: Spencer Fane
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop Re-variant portal at spencerfanecareers.viglobalcloud.com/viRecruitSelfApply/ReDefault.aspx with a Tag-based URL (uses ReDefault.aspx not RecDefault). Falls back to firm careers page for discovery. Standard viDesktop grid for job listings.

name: Taft Law
navigation_hints: Loads taftlaw.com/careers/?tab=professional-staff, finds viDesktop links at recruit.taftlaw.com/videsktopex/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx with FilterREID=7&FilterJobCategoryID=4&FilterJobID={id}. Visits each per-job viDesktop detail URL for salary and experience.

name: Thompson Coburn
navigation_hints: Loads the viDesktop Re-variant portal at thompsoncoburnselfapply.viglobalcloud.com/viRecruitSelfApply/ReDefault.aspx?FilterREID=3 (permanent, never expires). Also has Tag-based fallback URLs. Standard viDesktop grid for listings.

name: Tucker Ellis
navigation_hints: Starts on tuckerellis.com/careers/, navigates to the ADP WorkforceNow portal at workforcenow.adp.com/mascsr/default/mdf/recruitment/recruitment.html with a specific CID. Collects job listings, keyword-filters, and visits each detail page for salary.

name: UB Greensfelder
navigation_hints: Loads the AcquireTM ATS portal at ubglaw.acquiretm.com/home.aspx. Collects job links from the listing, visits each detail page at ubglaw.acquiretm.com/job_details_clean.aspx for title, location, and salary.

name: Vedder Price
navigation_hints: Starts on vedder.com/careers/administrative-staff/, scans for UltiPro links to recruiting.ultipro.com/VED1000/JobBoard/. Uses UltiproService to search by keyword and visit each OpportunityDetail page for salary.

name: AGG (Arnall Golden Gregory)
navigation_hints: Loads agg.com/careers/open-positions/, finds FLO Recruit apply links (florecruit.com/v2/app/agg/jobs/{id}/apply/). Uses the shared florecruit_crawler scrape_job_detail function to visit each apply URL for title, location, and salary.

name: SGR Business Professional
navigation_hints: Loads the FLO Recruit portal at florecruit.com/v2/app/sgrbusinessprofessional/jobs. React SPA; scrolls through all job cards for title, location, and salary.

name: Williams Mullen
navigation_hints: Loads the FLO Recruit portal at florecruit.com/v2/app/williamsmullen/jobs with position filters (positions=1504=t&1506=t). React SPA; scrolls through all job cards for title, location, and salary.

name: Hodgson Russ
navigation_hints: Loads the FLO Recruit portal at florecruit.com/v2/app/hodgsonruss/jobs. React SPA; scrolls through all job cards for title, location, and salary.

name: Vorys
navigation_hints: Loads the FLO Recruit portal at florecruit.com/v2/app/vorys/jobs. React SPA; scrolls through all job cards for title, location, and salary.

name: Womble Bond Dickinson
navigation_hints: Navigates directly to the viDesktop portal at wbd-us-careers.viglobalcloud.com/viRecruitSelfApply/RecDefault.aspx. Tag-based URL — if expired, discovers from careers page scanning hrefs for wbd-us-careers.viglobalcloud.com. Grid: #contentPlaceHolder_gridviewList. Searches via #contentPlaceHolder_textKeyWord. Role match mode: all_keywords. Location validation: max 60 chars, must match 'City, ST' pattern.
